title: Empire Express
short_description: All aboard the history train! Each carriage carries a famous landmark or invention — match it to the ancient civilization that made it.
description: The Empire Express pulls in with a carriage full of the ancient world's greatest hits — the Great Pyramids, the Colosseum, the Great Wall, aqueducts, the number zero, gunpowder — and you decide which civilization each one belongs to. It broadens history beyond any single culture, teaching the landmarks, inventions and big ideas of Egypt, Greece, Rome, China, the Maya and Mesopotamia, and how each civilization shaped the world. Grade bands ramp from instantly-recognisable landmarks, to inventions and ideas, to trickier achievements that make you really think. Correct matches and streaks earn bonus points. A free online ancient civilizations history game for kids in grades 1–5, feeding your score and GP on OnlyGrins.
controls: Mouse / tap the civilization that made the landmark or invention.
